title: 5. NG   Upper Three Yellow Points  ( 88.12 / 13 / 14 )
text:
These points are very powerful points in the lower extremities that are used in any
kind of liver, gallbladder and spleen problems and mysterious diseases that originate
from the liver and adrenal glands and cover a wide range of diseases.
The liver is an organ whose proper functioning is necessary for the proper
functioning of the lungs.
Types of liver and gallbladder tissue problems:
 Mental and psychological problems
 Heart disease and chest pain
 Blood pressure disorders (high and low)
 Blood sugar disorders (high and low)
 Headaches
 Weaknesses and fatigue and general body aches
 Side effects of antibiotics and medication
 Central nervous system problems such as Parkinson's, MS and Korea
 And a range of other problems and symptoms
